chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision Application No.S-163 of 2011 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl in d/o case For hearing of CMA 767/2020 (Restoration) 29-05-2023 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General–Sindh. ***** Private respondents No.7&8 (Abdul Majeed and Ghulam Rasool both by caste Soomro) are present in person and file their affidavits to the effect that they have entered into compromise with the applicants and have no objection in case order dated 25.08.2020 is recalled and the instant Civil Revision is restored to its original position; affidavits are taken on record. Listed application has been filed by the applicants for recalling of order dated 25.08.2020. In view of the affidavits filed by the above named respondents, the listed application stands allowed and the instant Civil Revision Application stands restored to its original position as it was on 25.08.2020. Adjourned to 21.08.2023. JUDGE Ahmad
